body.title: CLOSED: test_twm_context timeout on external Ollama service
body.result: Added _ollama_reachable() TCP probe (2s) at top of each test; @pytest.mark.timeout(120/360) overrides for Ollama-dependent tests; 4 pass when Ollama live, skip cleanly when not
body.description:
test_complex_questions_need_ring times out (>30s) when connecting to Ollama inference service. Test has skipTest logic but timeout fires first. Needs either: (1) increased pytest-timeout for this test, (2) better skip detection before calling external service, or (3) local mock of inference.

**Affected files:** tests/test_twm_context.py
**Design rules:** test-plan-or-why-not
**Scope boundary:** Fix timeout/skip behavior only, no migration-related code changes
**Test plan:** Run test with timeout increase; verify skip logic works when Ollama unavailable
